use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF ATTENTION DEFICIT HYPERACTIVITY DISORDER (ADHD) IN PEDIATRIC PATIENTS

indications.text:
COTEMPLA XR-ODT is indicated for the treatment of Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder
(ADHD) in pediatric patients 6 to 17 years of age [see Clinical Studies (14)].
